mapper.insert: insert into seller_oper_log( seller_id, seller_account_id, title, business_type, method, request_method, oper_name, oper_url, oper_ip, oper_location, oper_param, json_result, direct_login, direct_login_ticket_id, acting_admin_id, acting_admin_name, direct_login_reason, status, error_msg, cost_time, oper_time ) values ( #{subjectId}, #{accountId}, #{title}, #{businessType}, #{method}, #{requestMethod}, #{operName}, #{operUrl}, #{operIp}, #{operLocation}, #{operParam}, #{jsonResult}, coalesce(#{directLogin}, 0), #{directLoginTicketId}, #{actingAdminId}, #{actingAdminName}, #{directLoginReason}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{costTime}, sysdate() )

insert into buyer_oper_log( buyer_id, buyer_account_id, title, business_type, method, request_method, oper_name, oper_url, oper_ip, oper_location, oper_param, json_result, direct_login, direct_login_ticket_id, acting_admin_id, acting_admin_name, direct_login_reason, status, error_msg, cost_time, oper_time ) values ( #{subjectId}, #{accountId}, #{title}, #{businessType}, #{method}, #{requestMethod}, #{operName}, #{operUrl}, #{operIp}, #{operLocation}, #{operParam}, #{jsonResult}, coalesce(#{directLogin}, 0), #{directLoginTicketId}, #{actingAdminId}, #{actingAdminName}, #{directLoginReason}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{costTime}, sysdate() )
